query:
SELECT 
  rp.id,
  ac.name AS category,
  fi.name AS feedItem,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay AS qty,
  rp.isActive
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = rp.categoryId
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL
  AND ac.name IN ('Ram', 'Lamb', 'Baby Goat', 'Dog')
ORDER BY ac.name, fi.name;
